headline: Here Are Thursday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Adobe, Airbnb, ARM Holdings, Bank of America, CAVA Group, Robinhood Markets, Spotify, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading lower as we head into Thursday, and depending on today’s narrative about how the war in Iran is progressing, whatever is revealed could chart the stock market’s course once again. Stocks were up across the board on Wednesday after the United States announced a 15-point peace plan for Iran, ... headline: Morgan Stanley Downgrades AvalonBay Communities to Equal-Weight, Lowers Price Target to $203
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Adam Kramer   downgrades AvalonBay Communities (NYSE:AVB) from Overweight to Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $208 to $203.

headline: Family offices make opportunistic bets on real estate as investors sit on sidelines
summary: Investment firms of ultra-wealthy families are snapping up bargains in multifamily and commercial real estate.
